prompts.input: Run unit tests for the latest commit on main. Report counts.
Run the e2e Playwright suite. Capture screenshots of the home page, login, and dashboard. Save to docs/evidence/issue-77/e2e/.
Build #42 is RED. Failure: 'TypeError: Cannot read property of undefined'. File: src/api/users.ts:23. Stack: 5 frames. Classify.
Build #43 is RED. Same class as build #42: 'test' (integration_test_auth.test_session_timeout). 2nd consecutive red. What now?
Run Lighthouse mobile on /. Report scores for Performance, A11y, Best Practices, SEO. Flag any below 90.
Build #44 is GREEN. All 47 tests pass, 0 lint warnings. Approve for merge?
